chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُصِيبُهُ الْجَنَابَةُ فَلَا يَجِدُ إِلَّا الثَّلْجَ أَوِ الْمَاءَ الْجَامِدَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 43 – The man is hit by the sexual impurity but he cannot find except for the snow or the frozen water

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/184)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/184)
text: قَالَ إِنْ أَجْنَبَ فَعَلَيْهِ أَنْ يَغْتَسِلَ عَلَى مَا كَانَ عَلَيْهِ وَ إِنِ احْتَلَمَ تَيَمَّمَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, raising it, said,
‘Heasws said: ‘If one comes to be with sexual impurity, so upon him is that he should wash upon whatever was upon him, and if he were to bed-wet, he should perform Tayammum’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father in a marfu‘ manner the following: “(He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If he experiences sexual relation, he must take Ghusl (bath), but if it is a wet dream, he must take Tayammum.’”
